name_en: A spacious Catherine bag, crafted from selected large-scale brand plaid and smooth Italian tanned leather. Geometric pieces paired with the brand logo, inspired by the collar shape of a classic Trench coat. Debuted at Burberry Fall/Winter Women's Collection, named after the founder's wife (mother of 6 children). Features a reinforced leather handle or a detachable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials are bio-based, derived from plants and castor oil. 28 x 13 x 23cm. Top leather handle. Detachable adjustable shoulder strap. Zipper closure with side snap buttons. 2 external flap pockets, 2 internal slip pockets. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Front embossed Burberry logo
